text: My gut and liver… 😳🍋 were like new after 3 days! 🔥
No medication, no chemicals – just this fresh kiwi drink!
I had been feeling bloated, tired, and heavy for a long time…
not a good start to the day.
Until I started supporting my body from the inside out.
3 🥝 Kiwis:
Kiwi is rich in vitamin C and supports your digestion.
It helps your body work more easily.
Perfect for a fresh reset.
1 🍋 Lemon:
Lemon gets your metabolism going.
It makes you feel awake and refreshed.
Ideal for the morning.
1 🍏 Green Apple:
Green apples promote digestion and give you constant energy.
This makes you feel lighter and more active.
1 🍊 Orange:
Orange provides you with vitamin C and strengthens your immune system.
It gives you energy and freshness.
Perfect for more power.
1 🍐 Pear:
Pears are easy to digest and help with bloating.
They ensure a pleasant feeling in your stomach.
Ideal for a light body.
A piece of ginger:
Ginger activates your metabolism and supports digestion.
It gives you more energy and has an invigorating effect.
A true natural booster!
Mix with
700 ml of water
. 💥 Why this drink is going viral: ✔ Supports gut & liver
✔ Promotes digestion ✔ Can reduce bloating
✔ Supports metabolism ✔ Can help with weight loss
✔ Gives you more energy ⚡ ✔ Rich in vitamin C & antioxidants
🎯 Directions: Drink a glass every morning on an empty stomach for 3 days.
And observe how your body changes.
⚖️ Note: A balanced diet is crucial for long-term results.
⚠️ Disclaimer: This is not medical advice and does not replace professional medical consultation. Results may vary.
If you want to feel light and full of energy again…
save this video and start tomorrow!
Write “RESET” in the comments! And follow Delicious Meals for more natural detox tips! 🚀
